notes: Hand-curated snapshot for the 1 May 2026 Minderoo envelope. 4-6 featured stories across confirmed anchors. Live API path deferred to Year 1. Every entry here has written storyteller + elder consent for envelope-specific use, recorded in wiki/decisions/ same-day as snapshot build.
storyteller_voice_line: This is my story. I consent. I can take it back. Nothing changes for me if I do.

stories.title: Welcome to Country
stories.quote: When you stand here in Mparntwe, you are not just standing in a town. You're standing in one of the oldest cultural landscapes in the world.

stories.title: He know half of the black people
stories.quote: He right. That big fell. He know half of the black people. That's why.

storyteller.name: Benji
storyteller.portrait_to_capture_on: existing BG Fit archive — consent re-confirm needed for print use

stories.title: No pressure, no judgement
stories.quote: I like the fact that the mentors and the youth workers, they're easy to talk to. There's no pressure. It's more fun and you don't feel judged.

storyteller.name: Isabella, 14
storyteller.portrait_note: text-only card; photo consent not yet confirmed for envelope print

consent.sensitivity_context_preface: Shared by a young person in foster-care context. Please read with care. — Mounty Yarns

stories.country: Minjerribah (North Stradbroke Island), QLD — Quandamooka Country
stories.title: Under Elder authority
stories.quote: Thirty-two years this council has held the young ones. The envelope carries that lineage, or it doesn't go.

storyteller.name: MMEIC Elders-in-Council
storyteller.portrait_note: Collective representation — one photograph of the council, pending approval

consent.note: This card will flip to active once MMEIC council records the quote-level approval. Shown here with 'awaiting elder' status deliberately — demonstrates the gate working.

stories.country: Palm Island, QLD — Manbarra / Bwgcolman Country
stories.title: One voice at a time
stories.quote: [quote to be curated per individual storyteller consent — PICC does not give blanket consent]

storyteller.name: [Individual storyteller, per-consent]
storyteller.portrait_note: Per-storyteller; portrait included only when that individual has consented

elder.name: Rachael Atkinson
elder.note: PICC does not give org-blanket consent. Each storyteller is asked per-story.

consent.note: PICC card demonstrates the selective consent mode. Shown here in awaiting-elder state until per-storyteller consent captured.

honoured_withdrawals.body: Kai asked us to take his story back on 2026-04-12. We did, within 18 hours. ACT honours his choice. This placeholder will itself be removed on 2026-05-12 — a withdrawn story should not leave even a shadow behind indefinitely.
honoured_withdrawals.footer: Withdrawn · 2026-04-12 · via Kristy Bloomfield · EL v2 record: honoured

honoured_withdrawals.body: Lena asked us to remove her story from public view on 2026-03-27. We did the same day. The story is now held only by her and by Oonchiumpa.
honoured_withdrawals.footer: Withdrawn · 2026-03-27 · via Tanya Turner · EL v2 record: honoured

honoured_withdrawals.body: The Mount Isa compilation included a 14-year-old whose guardian asked us to pause it on 2026-02-14. We paused the compilation until each family re-confirmed. Three of six re-confirmed; the compilation now holds three voices.
honoured_withdrawals.footer: Paused → partially-restored · 2026-02-14 · via Brodie Germaine · EL v2 record: honoured

ben_checklist_before_1_may: Replace PLACEHOLDER el_v2_story_id values with real UUIDs from EL v2 (Supabase project yvnuayzslukamizrlhwb)
Swap portrait + hero paths for 21 April capture files as they land
Confirm MMEIC quote + elder approval status (currently 'awaiting_elder' demonstrates the gate; consider changing to active before ship if collected)
Confirm PICC selective-consent story + storyteller name + portrait; or keep as 'awaiting_elder' to demonstrate the mode
Reconfirm Isabella Mounty Yarns quote + photo consent for envelope print (currently text-only in dashboard)
Morning-of-1-May re-query EL v2 for each story_id; any withdrawn story → swap card for Honoured-Withdrawal tile with real example
Verify all three Honoured-Withdrawal examples are real and dated accurately (rotation-A date is 2026-04-12, placeholder)
